entity.label: Meraioth
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Father of Amariah, a high priest of the line of Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:6, 7, 52).

nodes.label: Meraioth
nodes.description: Father of Amariah, a high priest of the line of Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:6, 7, 52).

nodes.label: Amariah
nodes.description: One of the descendants of Aaron by Eleazar (1 Chr. 6:7, 52). He was probably the last of the high priests of Eleazar’s line prior to the transfer of that office to Eli, of the line of Ithamar.

verses.text: And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,
Meraioth begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,
Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,
And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
The son of Amariah, the son of Azariah, the son of Meraioth,
Seraiah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, was the ruler of the house of God.
